subcodes.first_line: Say: O Concourse of the Bayán! Fear ye the All-Merciful, and follow not the fountainheads of delusion who have turned away from God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ملاء البیان اتقوا الرحمن و لا تتبعوا مطالع الاوهام الذین اعرضوا عن الله
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
